title: Switch from HikerAPI to Apify for Instagram extraction
reasoning: HikerAPI was unreliable — missing fields, inconsistent responses. Apify has dedicated Instagram scraper with structured output.
predicted_outcome: Reliable extraction with 125 obs/account, <15 min per account

title: Use OpenAI GPT-4o-mini Batch API for classification
reasoning: Batch API is 50% cheaper than real-time. Classification doesn't need real-time. Batch results in 5-15 min per batch.
predicted_outcome: Reliable classification at $0.01/obs, 5-15 min batch time

title: File-first architecture (files = source of truth, DB = index)
reasoning: Files are auditable, diffable, versionable. Every bug was fixable because data was in JSON files we could grep and bulk-edit.
predicted_outcome: All data fixable without DB access. Schema changes are just file edits.

title: Autonomous daemon (ogz_enricher.py) running 24/7
reasoning: Mohamed works in bursts (Tue+Sun). Daemon runs unsupervised 5 days/week. Self-healing + self-validating.
predicted_outcome: Complete extraction of 100+ accounts without human supervision

title: Local Postgres + pgvector for platform testing
reasoning: Need pgvector for embeddings. Supabase requires account setup. Local Docker is fastest path to testing.
predicted_outcome: Full sync in <5 min, all queries working, swap to Supabase URL for production
